themes.label: Presence
themes.summary: This chapter highlights God’s nearness, abiding presence, indwelling, or covenant companionship. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 2 verses. Commentary leans on "How does Benjamin's faithfulness in dwelling near Jerusalem and maintaining temple worship ch...". Word-study detail reinforces "יָֽשְׁב֥וּ: dwelt - properly, to sit down (specifically as judge. in ambush, in quiet); by im...".
